name: Climb Out: Escape From Anomalous Sewer

reviews.review_title: Keep an eye on those anomalies
reviews.review_description:
I made it already to layer 8 💪💪💪💪.

You have to search for every little detail.

I enjoyed it very much.

reviews.review_title: OMGGGG this sewer loop game is addictive
reviews.review_description: Just trying to get past Layer 5—THAT zipline over the river had me sweating bullets 🥵 The headlamp lighting is sick, but why’d they make the camera battery die so fast??! Took a blurry pic of a weird slime trail and now I’m stuck replaying Layer 0… again 😤
